title: Casual / Hyper-Casual Game Profile Extensions
description: Additional profile fields specific to casual and hyper-casual games.

description.title: Core Loop Description
description.description: Brief description of the core gameplay loop (e.g., 'Swipe to merge tiles, score points, restart')

avg_loop_duration_seconds.title: Average Core Loop Duration (seconds)
avg_loop_duration_seconds.description: How long one play-result-reward cycle takes

loops_per_session_target.title: Target Loops Per Session
loops_per_session_target.description: Desired number of core loops per session

requires_account.title: Requires Account Creation
requires_account.description: Whether players must create an account before playing

time_to_first_play_seconds.title: Time to First Play (seconds)
time_to_first_play_seconds.description: Seconds from app open to first core gameplay

rewarded_ad_rewards.title: Rewarded Ad Rewards
rewarded_ad_rewards.description: What players get for watching rewarded ads (e.g., 'Extra life', '2x coins', 'Continue')

total_content_items.title: Total Content Items
total_content_items.description: Total levels, stages, or distinct content pieces

secondary_features.title: Secondary Features
secondary_features.description: Features beyond the core loop (daily challenges, leaderboards, etc.)
